project_title: Supply Chain Evidence Review Simple RAG
short_description: A beginner-friendly RAG project for reviewing supply chain evidence
domain_summary: Supply Chain Evidence Review involves analyzing data from various sources to identify trends, risks, and opportunities in a supply chain. This project aims to create a simple RAG (Red, Amber, Green) system to categorize evidence based on its significance and impact.
user_persona: Supply Chain Analyst: A beginner analyst responsible for reviewing supply chain evidence to identify trends and risks.
architecture_notes: Use Docker to containerize services for easy deployment and management
Implement API Gateway to handle incoming requests and route them to respective services
Use PostgreSQL as the database to store and manage data
frontend_features: Filtering and sorting capabilities for evidence review
data_sources: Supply chain data from various sources (e.g., CSV, Excel)
testing_strategy: Unit testing and integration testing using Pytest and Jest
starter_questions: What is the purpose of the RAG system?
What data sources will we use?
business_rules: Evidence must be categorized based on its significance and impact
RAG system must be user-friendly and easy to understand

tool_catalog.name: Docker
tool_catalog.description: Containerization platform for easy deployment and management

tool_catalog.name: FastAPI
tool_catalog.description: Python web framework for building APIs

tool_catalog.name: React
tool_catalog.description: JavaScript library for building user interfaces

agent_plan.name: Architecture Agent
agent_plan.role: Define app boundaries, data flow, runtime stack, and integration points.
outputs: Use Docker to containerize services for easy deployment and management
Implement API Gateway to handle incoming requests and route them to respective services
Use PostgreSQL as the database to store and manage data

agent_plan.name: Backend Agent
agent_plan.role: Design FastAPI modules, service contracts, validation, and error handling.

agent_plan.name: Frontend Agent
agent_plan.role: Design React screens, state flow, controls, and user feedback states.
outputs: Filtering and sorting capabilities for evidence review

agent_plan.name: Database Agent
agent_plan.role: Design persistence models, sample data, indexes, and audit records.

agent_plan.name: Testing Agent
agent_plan.role: Define contract tests, smoke tests, and generated project validation.
outputs: Unit testing and integration testing using Pytest and Jest

agent_plan.name: DevOps Agent
agent_plan.role: Define environment variables, Docker workflow, and repository packaging.

agent_plan.name: Reviewer Agent
agent_plan.role: Review the generated plan for completeness, security, and portfolio quality.

fallback_reason: OpenAI limit reached. Automatically switched to Groq.
